title: Karpov vs Unzicker
intro: In this game, watch for the control of key squares near the kings and how hanging pieces can change the dynamics. Both players will create and remove threats, leading to interesting tactical opportunities.
summary: After 85, White increased pressure on the black king by attacking key squares and creating a fork. Black's response with Kf8 limited their control. White's knight move further intensified the threats while removing a hanging piece.
